glosses.ja: 練習する; 訓練する

translations.en: I want to practice guitar today.
translations.fr: Je veux travailler la guitare aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi voglio esercitarmi con la chitarra.
translations.ru: Я хочу сегодня позаниматься на гитаре.
translations.he: אני רוצה להתאמן על הגיטרה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn tập đàn guitar.
translations.ar: أريد أن أتدرب على الجيتار היום.
translations.uk: Я хочу сьогодні позайматися на гітарі.
translations.hi: आज मैं गिटार की प्रैक्टिस करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να εξασκηθώ στην κιθάρα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil øve på gitar i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku ingin latihan gitar.
translations.sv: Jag vill öva på gitarr idag.
translations.ro: Astăzi vreau să exersez la chitară.
translations.da: Jeg vil øve mig på guitar i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はギターを練習したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) selecting a bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.
Common noun in accusative; direct object of the verb 'üben'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complements the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir üben jeden Tag ein bisschen Deutsch.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈyːbən ˈjeːdən taːk aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən dɔʏ̯tʃ/

translations.de: Wir üben jeden Tag ein bisschen Deutsch.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈyːbən ˈjeːdən taːk aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən dɔʏ̯tʃ/
translations.en: We practice a bit of German every day.
translations.es: Practicamos un poco de alemán todos los días.
translations.fr: On pratique un peu d’allemand tous les jours.
translations.it: Ogni giorno esercitiamo un po' di tedesco.
translations.ru: Мы каждый день немного занимаемся немецким.
translations.pt: Nós praticamos um pouco de alemão todos os dias.
translations.he: אנחנו מתרגלים קצת גרמנית כל יום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi luyện một chút tiếng Đức mỗi ngày.
translations.ar: نحن نتدرب على الألمانية قليلاً كل يوم.
translations.nl: We oefenen elke dag een beetje Duits.
translations.hu: Minden nap egy kicsit gyakorolunk németet.
translations.hi: हम हर दिन थोड़ा जर्मन का अभ्यास करते हैं.
translations.el: Κάθε μέρα εξασκούμαστε λίγο στα γερμανικά.
translations.nb: Vi øver litt tysk hver dag.
translations.id: Kami berlatih sedikit bahasa Jerman setiap hari.
translations.sv: Vi övar lite tyska varje dag.
translations.ro: Exersăm puțină germană în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Vi øver lidt tysk hver dag.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎日少しドイツ語を練習します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb (present, 1pl); denotes the action.
Determiner (accusative sg. masc.) modifying 'Tag' in a habitual time expression.
Common noun; head of the temporal accusative phrase 'jeden Tag'.
Indefinite article; part of the measure NP 'ein bisschen' quantifying the object.
Measure noun forming the quantifier 'ein bisschen' for the following noun.
Language name treated as a common noun; bare object of 'üben' quantified by 'ein bisschen'.

sentences.target: Lisa versucht nach der Arbeit zu üben.
sentences.reading: /ˈliːza fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxt naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t tsuː ˈyːbən/

translations.de: Lisa versucht nach der Arbeit zu üben.
translations.ipa: /ˈliːza fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxt naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t tsuː ˈyːbən/
translations.en: Lisa tries to practice after work.
translations.es: Lisa intenta practicar después del trabajo.
translations.fr: Lisa essaie de s'entraîner après le travail.
translations.it: Lisa cerca di esercitarsi dopo il lavoro.
translations.yue: Lisa 收工之後試吓練習。
translations.pt: Lisa tenta praticar depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Lisa cố gắng luyện tập sau giờ làm.
translations.ar: ليزا تحاول أن تتدرب بعد العمل.
translations.nl: Lisa probeert na het werk te oefenen.
translations.hi: लीसा काम के बाद अभ्यास करने की कोशिश करती है.
translations.el: Η Λίζα προσπαθεί να εξασκηθεί μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Lisa prøver å øve etter jobb.
translations.ro: Lisa încearcă să exerseze după serviciu.
translations.cs: Lisa se snaží cvičit po práci.
translations.da: Lisa prøver at øve efter arbejde.
translations.ja: リサは仕事のあとに練習しようとしている。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; subject of the clause.
Main verb (present, 3sg); takes a 'zu'-infinitive complement.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article (dative sg. fem.) agreeing with 'Arbeit' under 'nach'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'nach' in the PP 'nach der Arbeit'.
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite verb form.
Infinitive complement to 'versucht' (‘zu’-infinitive construction).

sentences.target: Ich fange gleich an zu üben.

translations.de: Ich fange gleich an zu üben.
translations.fr: Je commence à m'entraîner dans un instant.
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco vou começar a praticar.
translations.vi: Một lát nữa tôi sẽ bắt đầu luyện tập.
translations.hi: मैं जल्द ही अभ्यास शुरू करूँगा.
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα αρχίσω να εξασκούμαι.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi aku akan mulai berlatih.
translations.ja: もうすぐ練習を始めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1sg) of the separable verb 'anfangen'; the particle appears separately as 'an'.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy.
Separable verbal particle linked to 'anfangen' (coded via compound_id).
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite verb form.
Infinitive complement; part of the 'zu'-infinitive clause governed by 'anfangen'.
